figures.caption: FIG. 4. Eigenvalue spectra of the Koopman matrices obtained by the proposed method and EDMD for the coupled Duffing oscillators. Circles and crosses represent the eigenvalue spectra obtained by EDMD and by the proposed method, respectively.

FIG. 5. Means and standard deviations of the one-step-ahead prediction error using the Koopman matrices obtained by the proposed method and EDMD for the coupled van der Pol oscillators. The solid line with circles and the shaded area represent the means and standard deviations for EDMD, respectively. The dotted line with crosses and the shaded area represent the means and standard deviations for the proposed method, respectively.
